creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to crest from comment #0)
With the passage of time skalibs is now 2.8.0.1, which is reflected in the ports tree (good).  To build a s6-rc package, pkg-plist needs to be patched.  I'm now running s6-rc 0.5.0.0 installed via package :)

Index: /usr/ports/sysutils/s6-rc/pkg-plist
===================================================================
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/s6-rc/pkg-plist (revision 498786)
+++ /usr/ports/sysutils/s6-rc/pkg-plist (working copy)
@@ -13,9 +13,9 @@
 include/s6-rc/s6rc-utils.h
 include/s6-rc/s6rc.h
 lib/libs6rc.so
-lib/libs6rc.so.0.4
-lib/libs6rc.so.0.4.1
-lib/libs6rc.so.0.4.1.0
+lib/libs6rc.so.0.5
+lib/libs6rc.so.0.5.0
+lib/libs6rc.so.0.5.0.0
 lib/s6-rc/libs6rc.a
 libexec/s6-rc-fdholder-filler
 libexec/s6-rc-oneshot-run
